title: Null and Void
description: A resource pack that changes the textures of the End.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca800c4bf79b2025edc1ccdccb7b30c5c38c0ec_0.webp)
### _Do you think that the current textures of the End look a bit bland?_ **Ω** 
  Void, or Null and Void, changes the textures of the End. It adds many cool new endermen variants, giving them random articles of clothing. This pack also changes the Ender Dragon to become more serpentine, with horns and runes. π 
##   
  Requirements:
>   - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
>   - [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 

  Or...
>   - [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
## 
### **Disclaimer!**
  > As the Ender Dragon model for CEM changed in 1.21, the version you selects matters, as if you download the wrong version, the Ender Dragon WILL be broken!
